Cann-s..Bladder: Spasmodic closure of the neck of the bladder at the close of urination.
Cann-s..Chest: Catarrh of the chest. Bronchitis with wheezing. Asthma must have window open.
Cann-s..Generalities: Stitching in the skin all over while perspiring. Numbness of finger tips.
Cann-s..Head: Rush of blood to the head, as though it came from the stomach. Opening and shutting of the vortex begins on waking, lasts all day, and is worse from noise. Sensation of drops of cold water on scalp. Formication.
Cann-s..Mind: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream. Confusion is to his personal identity. Makes mistakes in writing and speaking, and misunderstands what he reads and hears said.
Cann-s..Stomach: Anxiety in the stomach. Aversion to meat.
Cann-s..Bladder, urination: Most difficult and painful urination. Violent urging to urinate. Constant or frequent urging to urinate. Involuntary urination. Violent pain at the close of urination.
Cann-s..Head, congestion: Rush of blood to the head, as though it came from the stomach.
Cann-s..Mind, sadness: Despondent in forenoon, lively in the afternoon.
Cann-s..Genitalia male: Oedema of the prepuce with gonorrhoea. Thick yellow gonorrhoeal discharge. Much dropsical swelling of the prepuce. Intense sexual excitement in both sexes. Chordee.
Cann-s..Mind, delirium: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream.
Cann-s..Mind, unconsciousness: Seems as though her senses would vanish.
Cann-s..Vision: Inflammation of the conjunctiva and varicose veins. Sensation of sand in the eyes.
Cann-s..Mind, delusions: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream. Confusion is to his personal identity.
